title: mentha longifolia var. candicans
intro: Mentha longifolia var. candicans, also known as Woolly Horned Mint, is a subspecies of mint that is characterized by its unique hairy leaves and stems. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of menthol, which has antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Mentha longifolia var. candicans include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, relieve headaches and nausea, and reduce stress and anxiety. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its numerous health benefits.
